# Documentation Index -- B&R Capital Dashboard Interface

**Last verified:** 2026-03-10
**Total documentation:** 10 documents, 12,910 lines
**Generated by:** Team 66 (Regeneration) -- Validation, Index & Findings Consolidation

This directory contains the complete architecture documentation suite for the B&R Capital Dashboard Interface project, produced by comprehensive read-only audits (v1: Teams 57-66, v2: Regeneration teams).

---

## How to Use This Documentation

1. **Starting point:** Read `findings-and-recommendations.md` first -- it consolidates every open issue into a single prioritized list with fix suggestions and suggested agent teams.

2. **New to the project?** Start with `frontend-architecture.md` and `backend-architecture.md` for a high-level inventory of every artifact in the system.

3. **Building a feature?** Read `data-flow-reference.md` to understand how data moves through the system, and `architecture-decisions.md` for conventions to follow.

4. **Deep dives:** Use the component and API reference docs when you need detailed behavior documentation for a specific component, endpoint, or data flow.

5. **Writing tests?** Use `test-coverage.md` to identify untested areas and prioritize test writing.

6. **Deploying?** Read `infrastructure-config.md` for all environment variables, Docker setup, and production configuration.

7. **Running agent teams?** Use `agent-team-reference.md` to select the right team configuration for each finding.

8. **Keeping docs current:** Each doc includes a "Generated" date. After significant code changes, re-run the relevant team to update the affected doc.

---

## Documentation Files

### Phase 1: Architecture Inventories

| # | Document | Description | Lines | Verified |
|---|----------|-------------|-------|----------|
| 1 | [frontend-architecture.md](frontend-architecture.md) | Complete frontend inventory: application bootstrap, router config, API client, Zustand stores, Zod schemas, type definitions, shared/feature hooks, React Query integration, component hierarchy by route, utilities, services, and contexts | 1,170 | 2026-03-10 |
| 2 | [backend-architecture.md](backend-architecture.md) | Complete backend inventory: FastAPI entry point, middleware chain (8 layers), authentication/authorization, API endpoints, CRUD layer, SQLAlchemy models (26 tables), Pydantic schemas, extraction pipeline, services, database layer, Alembic migrations, test suite, and settings reference | 1,179 | 2026-03-10 |
| 3 | [database-schema.md](database-schema.md) | Full database schema: 26 tables, mixins (Timestamp, SoftDelete), foreign key relationships, index inventory, 41 CHECK constraints, 12 enum types, model-vs-live schema drift notes, and migration history (15 migrations through `7c415cc1b77a`) | 965 | 2026-03-10 |
| 4 | [infrastructure-config.md](infrastructure-config.md) | Infrastructure configuration audit: 100+ environment variables, Docker dev/prod services (7 containers), Vite chunk splitting config, TypeScript config, ESLint/Ruff lint config, Python dependencies (79 packages), Node dependencies, npm scripts, Makefile targets, Alembic config, pytest config, Tailwind/PostCSS config, nginx reverse proxy, and Docker multi-stage builds | 1,036 | 2026-03-10 |

### Phase 2: Deep Documentation

| # | Document | Description | Lines | Verified |
|---|----------|-------------|-------|----------|
| 5 | [frontend-components.md](frontend-components.md) | Deep documentation of every frontend component and hook: application bootstrap, API client internals, stores, error tracking, contexts, shared/API/feature hooks, error boundaries, skeleton components, and all 13 feature modules. 14 issues identified. | 1,262 | 2026-03-10 |
| 6 | [backend-api-reference.md](backend-api-reference.md) | Complete request/response cycle documentation for every API endpoint: global conventions, authentication mechanisms, rate limiting, ETag caching, input sanitization, soft-delete pattern, and 14 endpoint groups (Auth, Properties, Deals, Analytics, Market, Interest Rates, Transactions, Documents, Users, Exports, Extraction, Monitoring, WebSocket, Health). 15 issues identified. | 2,252 | 2026-03-10 |
| 7 | [data-flow-reference.md](data-flow-reference.md) | End-to-end data flow traces for 13 major user actions: auth login, token refresh, deal list/detail/creation, property list/detail, deal comparison, extraction run, grouping pipeline, market data, report generation, and WebSocket subscription. Cross-cutting concerns documented. 8 issues identified. | 1,179 | 2026-03-10 |
| 8 | [architecture-decisions.md](architecture-decisions.md) | 19 recurring patterns documented, 7 existing ADRs reviewed (4 proposed), coding conventions for Python/TypeScript/testing/git, and 10 architectural issues identified | 494 | 2026-03-10 |
| 9 | [test-coverage.md](test-coverage.md) | Test infrastructure, backend test file map (2,155 tests across 99 files), frontend test file map (985 tests across 63 files), backend coverage gaps (API, CRUD, model, schema, service, middleware), frontend coverage gaps (stores, schemas, hooks, components), and prioritized gap list (7 critical, 10 high, 14 medium, 9 low) | 659 | 2026-03-10 |

## Document Dependency Graph

```
findings-and-recommendations.md  <-- consolidates issues from ALL docs below
    |
    +-- frontend-architecture.md
    |       +-- frontend-components.md (deep dive)
    |
    +-- backend-architecture.md
    |       +-- backend-api-reference.md (deep dive)
    |
    +-- database-schema.md
    |
    +-- infrastructure-config.md
    |
    +-- data-flow-reference.md (cross-references frontend + backend)
    |
    +-- architecture-decisions.md (cross-references all layers)
    |
    +-- test-coverage.md (cross-references backend + frontend)
    |
    +-- agent-team-reference.md (team definitions for each finding)
```
